entries.description: A free personalized daily brief delivered by SMS. A person enters a US mobile number and picks topics (local news, sports, stocks, weather, home reminders) to receive one short text each morning. Reply to personalize, STOP to cancel, HELP for help. Consent is never a condition of purchase.
representativeQueries: sign up for a morning weather text
simple SMS sports and stocks digest
daily brief by text with no app or login
text message reminders for trash day and bills
